scores.notes: OCR output matches ground truth text almost perfectly with only minor differences in apostrophe style (curly vs straight) and some added indentation spaces. No misspellings or missing words. No tables present, so table structure is fully preserved. Numeric data including date and form numbers are exact. Layout is well preserved though some extra indentation is added before paragraphs and signature block, which does not affect reading order. Overall, a very accurate OCR extraction.
